summary: Validated vertical right-sidebar tabs (Desktop/iPad/Mobile) + Auto-Discover momentum scanner + Robo core/watchlist endpoints. All 9 backend tests passed (100%). All 9 vertical tabs render & switch correctly across 3 viewports with active green-border indicator. Auto-Discover button in Robo-Trader Settings modal successfully returns 8 candidates with BUY direction, score and price fields.
critical_code_review_comments: TradingDashboard.jsx (~952 lines): file is now large — consider extracting the right-sidebar tab nav + content switcher into a separate <RightSidebarTabs/> component for maintainability.
robo_router.py auto_discover_watchlist: cache TTL hardcoded to 300s and _DISCOVER_TOP/_DISCOVER_SAMPLE are module constants. Acceptable, but worth moving to env vars for ops tuning.

auto_discover uses ThreadPoolExecutor with 8 workers inside an async route; the route does not await loop.run_in_executor and instead blocks on as_completed() — this blocks the event loop for up to ~15s per future. Consider wrapping in asyncio.to_thread() or using run_in_executor to keep event loop responsive.
TargetCapitalSettings.jsx auto-discover error handling shows only a generic 'Scan failed — try again' message; surface the underlying error for easier debugging.
Right sidebar nav text uses [7px] font on mobile (52px width) — readable but very tight. Acceptable for the compact icon-strip pattern.
seed_data_creation: POST /api/robo/watchlist with [RELIANCE.NS, TCS.NS] and max_parallel_trades=3 created for persistence test
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vertical tabs (data-testid='right-tabs-nav') verified on Desktop 1920x800 (nav box: 68x663px, all 9 tabs visible vertically), iPad 1024x768 (68x631px), Mobile 390x844 after clicking [data-testid='mobile-panel-right'] (52x324px). All 9 tab IDs present: tab-scanner, tab-strategies, tab-paper, tab-rlagent, tab-robo, tab-ensemble, tab-picker, tab-pece, tab-quant. Tab switching works for all 9 with active green-border indicator. Auto-Discover button is INSIDE the Robo-Trader Settings modal (open via Robo tab > Settings button > scroll to Parallel Trading Watchlist section). Returns 8 momentum candidates with BUY/SELL/HOLD direction. Backend: GET /api/robo/watchlist/discover validated, refresh=true bypasses 5-min cache. DEMON endpoint bug at server.py:5325 NOT tested (per instructions).
